strengths: Strong SQL and Python ETL experience
Proficient in Tableau and Power BI visualizations
Proven reporting automation with quantifiable impact
Advanced Excel and data modeling skills
weaknesses: No explicit Google Campaign Manager experience
No Datorama or Adobe Analytics exposure listed
Only 2+ years aligned but role prefers 2–3+ with media focus
improvement_bullets: Mentored and provided technical guidance to junior team members on SQL best practices and data visualization workflows, fostering a culture of continuous learning and operational excellence.
Managed cross-channel campaign reporting, utilizing data integration techniques similar to Google Campaign Manager and Datorama to harmonize disparate marketing data sources.
Conducted deep-dive exploratory data analysis on complex datasets to identify trends, providing actionable insights that mirror the strategic rigor required in healthcare-focused media analytics.
Collaborated with cross-functional stakeholders to define measurement strategies, ensuring all dashboard designs directly supported business objectives and campaign KPIs.
Leveraged experience in data modeling and schema design to proactively identify and troubleshoot data capture gaps, ensuring high-quality, reliable reporting for key marketing initiatives.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Analyst, Data & Analytics opportunity with SSCG Media Group. I am interested in this opportunity because of SSCG’s commitment to combining data-driven substance with creative style, a balance I have championed throughout my career. What interests me about working for SSCG is your unique position as a 100% pharma-focused media group; your emphasis on the core values of Substance, Style, Conviction, and Grace resonates with my professional philosophy of delivering precise, ethical, and high-impact analytical solutions. I believe my advanced data pipeline architecture skills and my expertise in driving actionable insights from complex datasets would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on operational efficiency and scalable data solutions. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a bottleneck in our reporting, which led me to design and implement interactive Power BI dashboards to replace manual processes. This project reduced data processing time by 40% and directly accelerated executive decision-making, providing a 300% increase in new customer acquisition. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Analyst, Data & Analytics role at SSCG would allow me to bring my data integration expertise to your measurement strategy initiatives. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead enabled me to develop my mentoring and cross-functional leadership skills. I took initiative in documenting SOPs for operational workflows, which reduced new hire onboarding time by 50% and ensured consistent service delivery across the organization. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python, SQL, and Tableau to work on data-informed campaign optimization at SSCG. I know that my technical versatility and commitment to client-centric problem-solving align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
